heading: Implementation of amendments made by Agricultural Research, Extension, and Education Reform Act of 1998

children.heading: Issuance of amended order
children.label: a Issuance of amended order
children.text: To implement the amendments made to this chapter by section 605 of the Agricultural Research, Extension, and Education Reform Act of 1998 (other than subsection (m) of that section), the Secretary shall issue an amended order under that reflects those amendments.section 4603 of this title

children.heading: Proposal of amended order
children.label: b Proposal of amended order
children.text: Not later than 90 days after , the Secretary shall publish a proposed order under that reflects the amendments made by section 605 of the Agricultural Research, Extension, and Education Reform Act of 1998. The Secretary shall provide notice and an opportunity for public comment on the proposed order in accordance with .June 23, 1998section 4603 of this titlesection 4604 of this title

children.heading: Issuance of amended order
children.label: c Issuance of amended order
children.text: Not later than 240 days after publication of the proposed order, the Secretary shall issue an order under , taking into consideration the comments received and including in the order such provisions as are necessary to ensure that the order conforms with the amendments made by section 605 of the Agricultural Research, Extension, and Education Reform Act of 1998.section 4605 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: On issuance of an order under reflecting the amendments made by section 605 of the Agricultural Research, Extension, and Education Reform Act of 1998, the Secretary shall conduct a referendum under this section for the sole purpose of determining whether the order as amended shall become effective.section 4605 of this title

children.heading: Individual provisions
children.label: B Individual provisions
children.text: No individual provision of the amended order shall be subject to a separate vote under the referendum.

children.heading: Eligible voters
children.label: 2 Eligible voters
children.text: The Secretary shall conduct the referendum among persons subject to assessment under the order that have been producers, producer-packers, importers, or handlers during the 2-calendar-year period that precedes the referendum, which period shall be considered to be the representative period.

children.label: i
children.text: the amended order had been in place during the representative period described in paragraph (2); and

children.label: ii
children.text: they had owed the increased assessments provided by the amended order.

children.heading: Votes and attributed quantity for producer-packers and importers
children.label: B Votes and attributed quantity for producer-packers and importers
children.text: The votes and the quantity of honey and honey products attributed to the votes of producer-packers and importers shall be determined in accordance with .section 4611 of this title

children.heading: Attributed quantity for handlers
children.label: C Attributed quantity for handlers
children.text: The quantity of honey and honey products attributed to the vote of a handler shall be the quantity handled in the representative period described in paragraph (2) for which the handler would have owed assessments had the amended order been in effect.

children.heading: Effectiveness of order
children.label: 4 Effectiveness of order
children.text: The amended order shall become effective only if the Secretary determines that the amended order is effective in accordance with .section 4611 of this title

children.heading: Continuation of existing order if amended order is rejected
children.label: e Continuation of existing order if amended order is rejected

children.text: the order issued under that is in effect on , shall continue in full force and effect; andsection 4603 of this titleJune 23, 1998
the Secretary may amend the order to ensure the conformity of the order with this chapter (as in effect on the day before ).June 23, 1998

children.heading: Effect of rejection on subsequent orders
children.label: f Effect of rejection on subsequent orders

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), if adoption of the amended order is not approved in the referendum required under subsection (d), the Secretary may issue an amended order that implements some or all of the amendments made to this chapter by section 605 of the Agricultural Research, Extension, and Education Reform Act of 1998, or makes other changes to an existing order, in accordance with the administrative procedures specified in sections 4604 and 4605 of this title.

children.heading: Approval
children.label: 2 Approval
children.text: An amendment to an order that implements a provision that is subject to a referendum shall be approved in accordance with before becoming effective.section 4611 of this title

children.heading: Effect on periodic referenda
children.label: g Effect on periodic referenda
children.text: If the amended order becomes effective, any referendum otherwise required to be conducted under shall not be held before the date that is 5 years after the date of the referendum conducted under this section.section 4612(c) of this title
